description.description: A short description of this group.

externalId.description: An identifier for this group in an external system, if linked.

disableMentions.description: Whether mentioning this group is disabled.

externalGroup.description: Details of the linked external group, if any.

memberCount.description: The number of users that are members of the group

createdAt.description: The date and time that this object was created

updatedAt.description: The date and time that this object was last changed
